raw_form_input.scenario_summary: Two adults and two children (ages 4 and 9) are living on one paycheck. Their income appears just under SNAP and LIHEAP cutoffs, and the younger child may still fall within Medicaid limits while the older child may not.
raw_form_input.language_or_stress_notes: Needs careful explanation of different thresholds by program and child age.

household_profile.language_or_stress_notes: Needs careful explanation of different thresholds by program and child age.
household_profile.scenario_summary: Two adults and two children (ages 4 and 9) are living on one paycheck. Their income appears just under SNAP and LIHEAP cutoffs, and the younger child may still fall within Medicaid limits while the older child may not.

matched_conditions: Household income 4090 is within the prototype SNAP threshold 4200.
Food hardship or low-income signal supports prescreening relevance.
caveats: Income appears close to the SNAP threshold and should be verified.

matched_conditions: Children in the household keep income within the prototype Medicaid/CHIP threshold 4300.
caveats: Child age bands may split Medicaid vs CHIP outcomes.

matched_conditions: Heating-assistance need is present and income 4090 is within the prototype LIHEAP limit 4200.
caveats: LIHEAP appears close to the income cutoff and should be verified.

matched_conditions: Income 4090 is within the prototype WIC limit 5900.

failed_conditions: No strong local referral trigger was detected in the prototype rules.

uncertainty_flags: Child coverage may vary by age band.
priority_rationale: Local Referral ranked with prototype score 45.

WIC: Proof of pregnancy or child age

next_steps: Gather the listed documents for the highest-priority programs first.
Address heating-bill urgency first if there is a shutoff or overdue balance.
Treat this as prescreening only, not an official eligibility determination.
checklist_explanation.user_explanation: Based on the information provided, this household may be a fit for LIHEAP, SNAP, Medicaid/CHIP, WIC. LIHEAP: Heating-assistance need is present and income 4090 is within the prototype LIHEAP limit 4200. SNAP: Household income 4090 is within the prototype SNAP threshold 4200. Medicaid/CHIP: Children in the household keep income within the prototype Medicaid/CHIP threshold 4300. WIC: Income 4090 is within the prototype WIC limit 5900. Caveats: SNAP threshold edge case. Child coverage may vary by age band. LIHEAP threshold edge case. LIHEAP appears close to the income cutoff and should be verified. Income appears close to the SNAP threshold and should be verified. Child age bands may split Medicaid vs CHIP outcomes. This is a prescreening and next-step guide, not an official determination.
visible_caveats: Child coverage may vary by age band.
LIHEAP appears close to the income cutoff and should be verified.
Income appears close to the SNAP threshold and should be verified.
Child age bands may split Medicaid vs CHIP outcomes.
